title: HH-15 projectile launcher

The [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] '''HH-15 projectile launcher''' was a shoulder-fired [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] widely used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] ground forces, notably [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|Rebel vanguard divisions]].

==Description==
[[File:HH-15_torpedo_warhead.jpg|thumb|left|180px|An [[HH-15 torpedo]] warhead]]
The HH-15 projectile [[Missile launcher/Legends|launcher]] was designed by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] to fire a variety of projectiles, including miniature [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]<ref name="Databank" /> and armor-piercing shells. Units cost 2000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and weighed 12 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The HH-15 was older than its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] counterpart, the [[MiniMag shoulder-launched proton torpedo launcher|MiniMag PTL]], and had inferior targeting sensors. However, many Rebel soldiers became quite adept at aiming the missile launcher manually to acquire a target lock. Further, its rugged design meant it could be operated in extreme climates and conditions,<ref name="Databank" /> such as in the freezing temperatures of [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. A number of HH-15 launchers were deployed during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Some models were modified by Rebel [[Rebel Vanguard/Legends|vanguards]] to fire two missiles per pull of the trigger. Such variants had a capacity for 8 missiles rather than 7 to compensate this feature and were used in a number of battlefields during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Star Wars: Battlefront" />

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the ''[[Battlefront]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series, the HH-15 launcher serves as the Rebel vanguard's primary weapon.
